properties.notes:
Property was main residence for 17 years, then left vacant (not rented) for 7 years while in aged care before selling.

**Timeline:**
- 1 Mar 2000 to 1 Apr 2017: Main residence (17 years)
- 1 Apr 2017 to 15 Aug 2024: Vacant while in aged care (7.4 years - not rented)

**Expected Result:**
- Under s118.145, property continues to be treated as main residence indefinitely when not used to produce income
- Property left vacant (not rented) = indefinite exemption
- **NO CGT PAYABLE**

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Section 118.145 ITAA 1997 (Indefinite Absence Rule)
- Property can be treated as main residence indefinitely when not rented
- No limit on how long the property can be vacant

user_query: Property at 15 Magnolia Street, Toowoomba QLD 4350, lived in for 17 years, then vacant for 7 years while in aged care

additional_info.scenario_title: Aged Care Entry with Indefinite Absence
additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - Indefinite absence rule applies (property not income producing)
